title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb analyzes DeepSeek V4, highlighting its major reduction in inference compute and cost compared to previous models. He contextualizes V4 within the broader competition between open-source and closed-source AI labs, arguing that different national incentives are driving distinct approaches to making LLMs more efficient and capable.
